title: Zoro’s Promise Is Revealed
description: On pages 9–12, this part turns Zoro’s imprisonment into open action as Luffy forces the fight against Morgan’s Marines.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: CAPTAIN!! THEY'RE TOO MUCH FOR US!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: IT'S HOPELESS! We can't fight a rubber man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...AND THAT DEMON RORDONOA ZOLO AT THE SAME TIME!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: All you cowards who were whining just now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Will shoot yourselves in the head!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: SOMETHING'S WRONG WITH THOSE NAVAL MARINES!!!

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
